Multimodal Connectivity Objectives: Increase share of active transportation modes (walking, biking, transit) used to commute to work for MPA residents by 2% by 2025
Increase percent of total sidewalks scoring above 70 in overall sidewalk compliance
Increase percent of total curb ramps scoring above 70 in overall curb ramp compliance
Increase mileage of bike facilities in the MPA by 10% by 2025
Increase mileage of trails in the MPA by 10% by 2025
Reduce vehicle miles traveled (VMT) per household in the MPA by 4% by 2025
Increase transit ridership between the urbanized area and outside the urbanized area by 5% by 2025
Performance Measures: Ridership between urbanized area and outside the urbanized area

Multimodal Connectivity Objectives: Expand MTD service area to be coterminous with urbanized area boundary by 2025
Performance Measures: Percentage of urbanized area contained inside C-U MTD service area

Multimodal Connectivity Objectives: Maintain or increase Amtrak ridership by 2025
Increase enplanements at Willard Airport by 10% from 2020 by 2025
